message:
fix: Add list(range()) codegen and ArrayList-to-ArrayList comparison

Long-term fix for list(range(...)) and ArrayList equality:

1. collections.zig: Specialized codegen for list(range(...))
   - Generates inline loop instead of calling runtime.builtins.range()
   - Produces ArrayListUnmanaged(i64) directly
   - Avoids *PyObject/PyValue type mismatch
   - Handles range(stop), range(start, stop), range(start, stop, step)

2. builtins.zig: ArrayList-to-ArrayList comparison in pyEqual
   - When both sides have .items and .capacity fields
   - Compare element-wise using recursive pyEqual
   - Enables comparing ArrayListUnmanaged(PyValue) vs ArrayListUnmanaged(i64)

This fixes test_tupleresizebug which does:
  def f(): for i in range(1000): yield i
  assertEqual(list(tuple(f())), list(range(1000)))

Where f() returns []PyValue and list(range(1000)) returns ArrayListUnmanaged(i64).
